name: Felafel in Pita Pockets
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried Chick Peas Cooked OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the chick peas thoroughly. Add the egg, onion, parsley, garlic, and spices. Mix well and season to taste with black pepper.
2. Shape the mixture into balls about the size of chestnuts. Coat each ball in flour.
3. Warm pita bread under the broiler or moderate oven.
4. Heat oil in a frying pan until it covers the base thinly. Saute the falafel in batches for 3 minutes on each side until golden brown. Drain well on paper towels.
5. Cut each pita bread in half across the center. Fill each with falafel, sliced tomato, and cucumber. Garnish with lemon and fennel (in place of egg, use 2 tsp chickpea flour).
